_note: The interactive quick-reply buttons that are attached INSIDE a specific agent message (never rendered as a permanent footer/toolbar bar), the deterministic mapping from a clicked button's id to the intent it resolves to (so a click never depends on re-parsing its own label), and the shared service-button intent. Service-selection buttons themselves come from laundry_services.json (id = service key, text = label).

behavior_notes.book_pickup: Start the booking flow (ask which service, then collect item details, area, time, review, confirm).
behavior_notes.track_order: Ask for the order ID. In mock mode say live order tracking is not connected yet.
behavior_notes.change_pickup_time: Ask for the order ID and preferred new pickup time. Never confirm the change automatically.
behavior_notes.add_more_items: Ask what items the customer wants to add.
behavior_notes.cancel_order: Ask for the order ID and say the team will confirm whether it can still be cancelled. Never cancel automatically.
behavior_notes.call_support: Say the LaundryKhalaas support team will follow up. In mock mode say it is not connected to a live support team yet.
